pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.438) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Science. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Science roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Governance is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Science. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Science competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.438) and edge-domain placement (Data Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Science. All passes support exclusion.
